chapter_title.en: Chapter on Making up Fasts of the Month of Ramadan

text: 1995 - رَوَى عُقْبَةُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ مَرِضَ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَلَمَّا بَرَأَ أَرَادَ اَلْحَجَّ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ بِقَضَاءِ اَلصَّوْمِ قَالَ «إِذَا رَجَعَ فَلْيَصُمْهُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1995 - It was narrated by Uqbah ibn Khalid from Abu Abdullah (as):
"Regarding a man who became ill during the Month of Ramadan and, after recovering, intended to perform Hajj, how should he deal with making up the missed fasts?
Imam (as) said: 'When he returns, he should fast them.'"
